ItacPersonItem.Notes: In Vicenza he was also a member of the Costanti Academy, to which he dedicated Dialogo del modo de lo tradurre (1556) For his biography, see F. Pignatti, `Longiano, Fausto`, in DBI. His affiliation to the Dubbiosi is in Ruscelli, Del Tempio (1555).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
